name: meeting-content-workflow
description: Example declarative extension that combines meeting-note metadata, task follow-ups, outlines, callouts, and template scaffolding for content workflows.

permissions.reason: Reads local meeting notes, headings, tasks, tags, and frontmatter fields already available to Forge.
Writes bounded checklist, callout, heading cleanup, and template scaffold transforms into the current note when requested.

contributes.label: Meeting and content metadata
contributes.description: Declares fields useful for meeting summaries, editorial briefs, action items, and agent follow-up notes.

contributes.label: Properties
contributes.description: Declares Forge's supported frontmatter widget for meeting status, owner, audience, and content type fields.

contributes.label: Outline
contributes.description: Declares Forge's supported outline widget for navigating meeting notes and content briefs.

contributes.label: Task summary
contributes.description: Declares Forge's supported task summary widget for action items and editorial follow-ups.

contributes.label: Append workflow scaffold
contributes.description: Declares the validator-supported append-template transform for meeting summaries and content briefs.

contributes.label: Convert action items to checklist
contributes.description: Declares the supported checklist transform for converting meeting follow-ups into tasks.

contributes.label: Wrap decision as callout
contributes.description: Declares the supported callout transform for decisions, risks, and open questions.

contributes.label: Normalize workflow headings
contributes.description: Declares the supported heading cleanup transform for meeting and content notes.
